summary: Verified Vercel dependency-conflict fix on Zorka Holding static React landing page. Confirmed date-fns and react-day-picker are fully removed and site renders correctly with zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.js is 914 lines — consider splitting into smaller section components (Hero, Criteria, About, Mission, Partners, Why, Portfolio, Contact, Footer) for maintainability. Not blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static React landing page, no backend. All required data-testids present. Public URL: https://institutional-cre.preview.emergentagent.com. If future changes are made, re-verify: (1) grep -rE '(react-day-picker|date-fns)' /app/frontend/src → must be empty, (2) HTTP 200 + 0 console errors on landing page, (3) all 16 sections/cards render.
